codeReview.summary: Implementation provides per-worktree environment isolation with PATH, env vars, and filesystem scope. The WorktreeIsolation and WorktreeIsolationConfig structs are well-designed with a builder pattern. All expected behaviors are implemented: isolated environment, PATH includes worktree-local bin, and scoped environment variables. 15 tests cover the functionality. One minor test issue found.

issues.description: Duplicate assertion in test_build_command_env: 'assert!(env.contains_key("PATH"))' appears twice (lines 418 and 419). The second assertion should likely verify a different key (e.g., SWELL_WORKTREE) to match the pattern in other tests.

is_path_in_scope() falls back to string comparison when canonicalization fails. This could allow false positives in edge cases like symlinks or paths with '..' components. However, this appears to be intentional fallback behavior for non-existent paths.

summary: Feature implementation is solid. WorktreeIsolation provides per-worktree environment isolation with isolated PATH (worktree-local bin prepended), scoped environment variables (with optional parent inheritance), and filesystem scope checking. Builder pattern well implemented. 15 unit tests cover all functionality. One minor duplicate assertion in test code, otherwise clean implementation.
